# Smilery — Orthodontics, Reimagined (Full Reference)

> Comprehensive guide to Smilery orthodontics practice — Miami Shores, FL

This is the extended version of llms.txt for AI systems that need deeper context about Smilery.

---

## Brand Identity

**Name:** Smilery
**Legal Name:** Smilery Orthodontics LLC
**Tagline:** Orthodontics, Reimagined
**Founded:** 2026
**Industry:** Healthcare / Orthodontics
**Tax ID:** lorem-tax-id

### Brand Values
1. **Patient-First Experience** — Every touchpoint is designed around patient comfort and confidence
2. **Modern Technology** — Digital X-rays, 3D intraoral scanning, advanced treatment planning software
3. **Aesthetic Excellence** — A design-forward practice that reflects the beauty of the smiles we create
4. **Community** — Deeply rooted in the Miami Shores community, serving diverse families
5. **Transparency** — Clear pricing, honest timelines, and open communication throughout treatment

### Brand Aesthetic
- **Color Palette:** Cream (#F4EFEA) primary background, Ink (#0E0E0E) primary text, Coral/Salmon accent (#E98C73)
- **Typography:** Urbano Expanded (display), Inter (body), Fraunces (accent/italic)
- **Design Approach:** Clean, minimal, premium healthcare aesthetic

---

## Detailed Services

### Traditional Metal Braces
- **Description:** High-quality stainless steel brackets and archwires for precise teeth alignment
- **Ideal For:** Children, teens, and adults with moderate to complex orthodontic needs
- **Duration:** 12–24 months typical treatment time
- **Includes:** All adjustment appointments, emergency visits, and basic retainer set
- **Technology:** Self-ligating brackets for faster treatment and fewer adjustments

### Ceramic Braces
- **Description:** Tooth-colored polycrystalline alumina brackets that blend naturally with teeth
- **Ideal For:** Patients who want effective braces with a more subtle appearance
- **Duration:** 12–24 months typical treatment time
- **Advantage:** Nearly invisible on teeth while providing the same effectiveness as metal braces

### Invisalign Clear Aligners
- **Description:** Custom-fabricated, FDA-cleared clear plastic aligners by Align Technology
- **Ideal For:** Teens and adults with mild to moderate alignment issues
- **Duration:** 6–18 months typical treatment time
- **Features:** Removable for eating and brushing, virtually invisible, SmartTrack material
- **Includes:** All aligner sets, refinement aligners, and retainers

### Clear Aligner Therapy
- **Description:** Premium clear aligner treatment using advanced 3D planning technology
- **Ideal For:** Adults and teens seeking the most discreet orthodontic option
- **Duration:** Varies by complexity
- **Features:** Custom treatment planning with predictive 3D modeling

### Early Orthodontic Treatment (Phase I)
- **Description:** Interceptive orthodontic treatment for developing children
- **Ideal For:** Children ages 7–10 with crossbites, crowding, or jaw growth issues
- **Duration:** 6–12 months
- **Goal:** Guide jaw growth, create space for permanent teeth, correct harmful habits

### Surgical Orthodontics
- **Description:** Combined orthodontic-surgical treatment for severe skeletal discrepancies
- **Ideal For:** Adults with significant jaw alignment issues that cannot be corrected with braces alone
- **Process:** Pre-surgical orthodontics → orthognathic surgery → post-surgical orthodontics
- **Coordination:** Works closely with board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeons

### Retainers & Post-Treatment Care
- **Description:** Custom retainers to maintain treatment results long-term
- **Options:** Clear (Essix) retainers, Hawley retainers, permanent bonded retainers
- **Recommendation:** Full-time wear for 6 months post-treatment, then nighttime wear indefinitely

---

## Team & Credentials

### Dr. Lorem Ipsum, DMD, MS — Lead Orthodontist
- **Education:**
  - Bachelor of Science in Biology — Lorem University
  - Doctor of Dental Medicine (DMD) — Lorem University School of Dental Medicine
  - Master of Science in Orthodontics (MS) — Lorem Institute of Orthodontics
  - Certificate in Orthodontics and Dentofacial Orthopedics
- **Board Certification:** American Board of Orthodontics (ABO) Certified
- **Professional Memberships:**
  - American Association of Orthodontists (AAO)
  - American Dental Association (ADA)
  - Florida Dental Association (FDA)
  - Southern Association of Orthodontists (SAO)
  - Miami-Dade Dental Society
- **Experience:** Over 10 years treating children, teens, and adults
- **Specialties:** Invisalign Diamond Provider, complex adult cases, early intervention
- **Philosophy:** "Every patient deserves a smile that reflects their best self. At Smilery, we combine the latest technology with genuine care to create an orthodontic experience that's as beautiful as the results."

---

## Office & Facilities

### Office Design
- Modern, design-forward aesthetic with warm cream tones and natural materials
- Open-concept treatment area with private consultation rooms
- Digital check-in kiosks for seamless arrival experience
- Dedicated sterilization center exceeding OSHA and CDC standards

### Technology
- **Digital X-rays** — 80% less radiation than traditional X-rays
- **3D Intraoral Scanner** — Eliminates messy impressions, provides instant digital models
- **CBCT (Cone Beam CT)** — 3D imaging for precise diagnosis and treatment planning
- **Digital Treatment Planning** — Advanced software for predictive treatment visualization
- **Patient Portal** — Online appointment scheduling, treatment progress tracking, and communication

### Amenities
- Free on-site parking
- Full wheelchair accessibility (ADA compliant)
- Complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi
- Complimentary beverages (coffee, tea, water, juice)
- Individual TVs with streaming in each treatment bay
- Charging stations for mobile devices
- Kid-friendly waiting area with entertainment
- Comfortable seating with massage chairs in waiting area

---

## Insurance & Financial Information

### Accepted Insurance Plans
- Delta Dental (Premier & PPO)
- Cigna Dental
- Aetna Dental
- MetLife Dental
- United Healthcare Dental
- Guardian Dental
- Humana Dental
- BlueCross BlueShield Dental
- Florida Healthy Kids
- Medicaid (select plans)
- And many more — call to verify your specific plan

### Payment Options
- Cash
- Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover
- HSA (Health Savings Account)
- FSA (Flexible Spending Account)
- CareCredit financing (0% interest options available)
- In-house payment plans (no credit check, 0% interest)

### Pricing Philosophy
- Transparent, upfront pricing with no hidden fees
- Free initial orthodontic consultation (valued at $250)
- Treatment fees include all follow-up appointments
- Family discounts available for multiple family members in treatment
